# Execution History Search

**Slug:** `execution-history-search` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 2

Retrive execution history by filtering on the fields such as time period, workspaces while exluding plan execution tasks.

[← Back to API index](./README.md)

## Tools by tag

- [untagged](#untagged) (2)

## untagged

### `execution_history_search__post_monitoring_observability_execut_2`

```
POST /monitoring/observability/executions/download
```

Download execution records from history

Use this endpoint to download historical executions by filtering various execution fields, includingincluding `workspaceId`, `environmentId`, `name`, `destination`, or `tags`.      

This endpoing also supports partial match for faster searches.
   
In addition, you can use  the `exclude` parameter to exclude plan executions or executions triggered in a plan.
Partial match is also supported for a quicker search performance.

This endpoint makes use of a keyset pagination.
* `limit` is used to set the page size.
* `lastId` contains the last element of the previous page. You can get it from the downloaded CSV file.

The elements are sorted according to the following criteria
* runEndTime in desc order 
* triggerTime in asc order
* id in desc

_No path/query/header parameters._

**Request body** (`application/json`): `DownloadRequest`. Schema: `DownloadRequest`.


### `execution_history_search__post_monitoring_observability_executio`

```
POST /monitoring/observability/executions/search
```

Get execution records from history

Use this endpoint to filter historical executions by filtering various execution fields, including `workspaceId`, `environmentId`, `name`, `destination`, or `tags`.      
This endpoing also supports partial match for faster searches.
   
In addition, you can use  the `exclude` parameter to exclude plan executions or executions triggered in a plan.

_No path/query/header parameters._

**Request body** (`application/json`): `SearchRequest`. Schema: `SearchRequest`.
